info.name: Gittes Glamping API
info.description:
Full collection for Gittes Glamping backend.

Environment variables needed:
- baseUrl  → http://localhost:3042
- token    → set automatically by Sign In
- stayId   → set automatically by Create Stay
- activityId → set automatically by Create Activity
- reviewId → set automatically by Create Review
- bookingId  → set automatically by Create Booking
- messageId  → set automatically by Send Message
- subscriberId → set automatically by Subscribe
- userId   → set automatically by Register
- myListId  → set automatically by Create MyList

item.name: Auth
item.description: Sign in and token verification. Sign In auto-saves {{token}}.

item.name: Sign In
item.description: POST /auth/signin — returns JWT. Token is auto-saved to {{token}}.

exec: var j = pm.response.json(); if (j.data && j.data.token) pm.collectionVariables.set('token', j.data.token);

item.name: Verify Token
item.description: POST /auth/token — validates existing JWT and returns user.

exec: pm.test('Has field: status', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status'); });
pm.test('Has field: data', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('data'); });

item.name: Users
item.description: User registration and management. Register auto-saves {{userId}}.

item.name: Register (opret bruger)
item.description: POST /users — public. Creates a new user. Auto-saves {{userId}}.

exec: pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Has field: email', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('email'); });
pm.test('Has field: role', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('role'); });
var j = pm.response.json(); if (j._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', j._id);

item.name: Get Me
item.description: GET /users/me — requires JWT. Returns the logged-in user from token.

exec: pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: email', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('email'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Has field: role', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('role'); });
pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: email', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('email'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });

item.name: Update User
item.description: PUT /users/:id — JWT required (own user or admin). Uses {{userId}}.

item.name: My List (favoritter)
item.description: Personal saved lists — all routes require JWT. Create/Update auto-saves {{myListId}}.

item.name: Create / Update My List
item.description: POST /mylists — creates list or updates existing by name. Auto-saves {{myListId}}.

exec: pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Has field: userId', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('userId'); });
var j = pm.response.json(); if (j._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('myListId', j._id);

item.name: Get All Reviews – admin (inkl. skjulte)
item.description: GET /admin/reviews — admin JWT required. Returns all including hidden.

exec: pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Has field: review', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('review'); });
pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Has field: review', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('review'); });
pm.test('Has field: isVisible', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('isVisible'); });
var j = pm.response.json(); if (j._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('reviewId', j._id);
pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });

pm.test('Has field: checkOut', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('checkOut'); });
pm.test('Has field: status', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status'); });
var j = pm.response.json(); if (j._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('bookingId', j._id);

item.name: Update Booking Status (admin)
item.description: PATCH /admin/bookings/:id/status — uses {{bookingId}}. Valid: ny, bekræftet, aflyst.

exec: pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: name', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('name'); });
pm.test('Has field: email', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('email'); });
pm.test('Has field: message', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message'); });
pm.test('Has field: status', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status'); });
var j = pm.response.json(); if (j._id) pm.collectionVariables.set('messageId', j._id);

item.name: Update Message Status (admin)
item.description: PATCH /admin/messages/:id/status — uses {{messageId}}. Valid: ny, læst, besvaret, arkiveret.

exec: pm.test('Has field: _id', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('_id'); });
pm.test('Has field: email', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('email'); });
pm.test('Has field: subscribedAt', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('subscribedAt'); });

item.name: Upload
item.description: Image file upload. Returns a URL path.

item.name: Upload Image
item.description: POST /upload — multipart/form-data, field name: image. Returns { url: "/uploads/..." }.

item.name: Bulk Import
item.description: Seed multiple records in one call.

item.name: Bulk Import – én type
item.description: POST /bulk/:type — set :type to stays, activities, or reviews. Body is an array of objects.
